---
title: Roadmap
sidebar: default
---

This page is forward-looking only. For released changes, see [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/behaverse/studyflow-modeler/releases).

### Near-term

- Schema editor for data stores
- More worked examples (analysis, MLOps, data collection)
- Improved modeler UX/UI
- Specifications for the data elements

### Later

- Reduce friction around external-schema authoring
- Broader runtime integrations beyond the Behaverse Data Server
